title: Java
subTitle: Enterprise-Grade Back-End Development
overviewContent: I have over 8 years of professional experience using Java to architect, develop, and maintain robust enterprise back-end systems. I apply object-oriented principles and design patterns to multi-tier architectures, build multi-module projects with Gradle, integrate with complex third-party APIs, and optimise high-traffic, mission-critical applications. I'm comfortable refactoring legacy systems for scalability and maintainability, ensuring long-term operational stability in corporate environments.
